message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Traffic influencing flows between OpenNESS controller and 5G Core
header Intel Corporation
footer Proprietary and Confidential

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor LightYellow
  BorderColor black
}
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "User/Admin" as User
participant "UI/CLI" as UI
participant "AF Microservice" as AF
participant "NEF" as NEF
participant "NGC\nCP Functions" as NGC

box "OpenNESS Controller components" #LightBlue
  participant UI
  participant AF
end box

box "5G Core components" #LightGreen
  participant NEF
  participant NGC
end box

note right of NEF
  OpenNESS provided
  Core component with
  limited functionality
end note

== Get all subscribed traffic influence info ==
User -> UI: Request all traffic influence\nsubscribed
activate UI
UI -> AF: /af/v1/subscriptions : GET
activate AF
AF -> NEF: /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afId}/subscriptions\n: GET
activate NEF
NEF -> NEF: NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
activate NEF
NEF -> NGC: {Open: 3rd party NGC\nintegration with\nOpenNESS(NEF)}
activate NGC
NGC --> NEF
deactivate NGC
deactivate NEF
NEF --> AF: OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate NEF
AF --> UI: OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate AF
UI --> User: Traffic influence details
deactivate UI

== Get subscribed traffic influence info by subscriptionId ==
User -> UI: Request traffic influence using\nsubscriptionId
activate UI
UI -> AF: /af/v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\n: GET
activate AF
AF -> NEF: /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\n: GET
activate NEF
NEF -> NEF: NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
activate NEF
NEF -> NGC: {Open: 3rd party NGC\nintegration with\nOpenNESS(NEF)}
activate NGC
NGC --> NEF
deactivate NGC
deactivate NEF
NEF --> AF: OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate NEF
AF --> UI: OK: traffic influence info\nERROR: {400/500}
deactivate AF
UI --> User: Traffic influence details
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
